name: GitHub Copilot
description: AI pair programmer by GitHub/OpenAI. Suggests code completions, writes functions from comments, and answers questions about your code.
whyUseIt: Copilot accelerates coding by 30-50%. It suggests entire functions, writes boilerplate, handles repetitive patterns, and can explain unfamiliar code. Works in VS Code, JetBrains, and Neovim.
